title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AI Agent & LLM Application Development
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has been completed with a total of 13 trainees. The overall attendance rate is 90.4%, with a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 92.3%. The average score achieved by trainees is 7.88 out of 10, indicating a generally positive reception of the training content. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, suggesting potential areas for improvement despite the high completion and attendance rates.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has an effectiveness score of 89.47 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The average score of 7.88/10 and a feedback rating of 4.73/5 reflect a favorable perception of the training.
This suggests that while the majority of trainees performed well, there are individuals who may require additional support.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, consider reviewing the course content to ensure it meets the diverse learning needs of all participants.
Continuous monitoring of trainee performance and feedback should be established to identify and address any emerging issues promptly.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
